title: Jakarta Servlet Request-Response Flow
description: Illustrates the lifecycle and interaction flow between a client, web server, and a Jakarta Servlet
relationships: Client sends HTTP Request to Web Server
Web Server forwards request to Servlet Container
Servlet Container manages Servlet lifecycle (init, service, destroy)
HttpServlet's service() method calls doGet()/doPost() based on request type
Application Logic processes request and generates data
Servlet uses Response Object to send HTTP Response back to Client
